Riyadh · Saudi Arabia
Director · Applications & Digital Solutions
About

Shaping the Digital Future
of Saudi Institutions

Technology and Digital Transformation Leader with over 15 years of experience in Enterprise Applications, Digital Solutions, Business Intelligence, and IT Strategy across government and enterprise sectors.

Currently serving as Head of Applications & E-Services at the General Authority for Competition, leading enterprise digital transformation aligned with Saudi Vision 2030.

Guinness World Record holder (2018), recognized at the Ministry of Higher Education's 5th Educational Forum (2013), and specialized in IT governance frameworks ITIL v4, COBIT, and TOGAF.

Honours

Awards & Achievements

🏆
2018
Guinness World Record
Guinness World Records · Hajj Hackathon

Achieved a Guinness World Record through participation in the Hajj Hackathon, where Ibrahim led the development of a blockchain-based banking transaction system inspired by Bitcoin — enabling secure, decentralized financial transactions within the Hajj ecosystem.

🎖️
2013
Ministry of Higher Education Recognition
5th Educational Forum · Ministry of Higher Education

Honoured at the 5th Educational Forum of the Ministry of Higher Education for presenting innovative research on "Sakani" — a mobile application designed to streamline real estate ownership and rental procedures in Saudi Arabia, simplifying property transactions for citizens.
